prompt: A vintage travel poster for {argument name="destination name" default="KYOTO"}, Japan, designed in a nostalgic mid-century tourism style with a faded paper texture, softly worn edges, and warm sun-aged colors. Use a vertical poster layout with rounded corners and a cream border. At the top, place the large headline {argument name="headline text" default="KYOTO"} in oversized elegant red serif letters, with “JAPAN” centered below in dark blue serif type and thin decorative divider lines. Add an italic tagline beneath it reading {argument name="tagline text" default="Timeless Beauty. Endless Memories."}. The main image should show a dramatic low-angle view of a traditional five-story Japanese pagoda in vivid vermilion red with dark wooden eaves and black railings, standing on a stone base with a wooden walkway in the foreground. Surround the pagoda with green wooded hills, a bright blue sky, and soft cream-colored clouds. On the left side, include a vertical red label with white Japanese characters reading “京都、日本”. Also add a blooming cherry blossom branch entering from the left, with clusters of pale pink flowers. In the upper right corner, include a postage stamp featuring a pagoda silhouette in muted red tones, partially overlapped by a circular postal cancellation mark reading “KYOTO JAPAN” with the kanji “京都” in the center and a few wavy postmark lines extending rightward. At the bottom, add a centered vintage footer slogan in serif capitals reading {argument name="footer text" default="DISCOVER TRADITION. EMBRACE KYOTO."}. The overall look should feel romantic, collectible, slightly distressed, and like a classic Japanese tourism print from the 1950s or 1960s.
translatedPrompt: 一张复古旅行海报，主题为 {argument name="destination name" default="KYOTO"}（日本），采用怀旧的 20 世纪中期旅游风格设计，带有褪色的纸张质感、轻微磨损的边缘以及温暖的岁月色调。使用带有圆角的竖版海报布局，并配以奶油色边框。顶部放置醒目的大标题 {argument name="headline text" default="KYOTO"}，采用超大号优雅红色衬线字体；下方居中放置深蓝色衬线字体的“JAPAN”，并配有细长的装饰分割线。下方添加斜体标语 {argument name="tagline text" default="Timeless Beauty. Endless Memories."}。主体画面应展示一个极具张力的低角度视角，呈现一座鲜艳朱红色的传统日本五重塔，配有深色木质屋檐和黑色栏杆，矗立在石基上，前景为木质走道。塔周围环绕着绿色的树木繁茂的山丘、明亮的蓝天和柔和的奶油色云朵。左侧包含一个垂直的红色标签，上面印有白色日文字符“京都、日本”。同时，从左侧伸入一枝盛开的樱花，带有簇簇淡粉色的花朵。在右上角，加入一枚邮票，上面有暗红色的塔影，部分被一个圆形的邮戳覆盖，邮戳上写着“KYOTO JAPAN”，中心为汉字“京都”，并向右延伸出几条波浪形的邮戳线。底部添加居中的复古页脚标语，采用衬线大写字母，内容为 {argument name="footer text" default="DISCOVER TRADITION. EMBRACE KYOTO."}。整体外观应呈现出浪漫、具有收藏价值、略带磨损感，如同 20 世纪 50 年代或 60 年代的经典日本旅游印刷品。

breakdown.creativeCore: 复古京都旅行海报：此提示词可生成复古风格的京都旅游海报，非常适合用于旅行艺术印刷品、编辑封面或目的地主题的墙面装饰。
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.bestUse: 活动海报、品牌主视觉、展览宣传、社媒封面

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: centered, poster layout, vertical]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: vintage]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
包含标注/说明。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
